scripts.prepare: node -e "const{copyFileSync,chmodSync,mkdirSync}=require('fs');try{mkdirSync('.git/hooks',{recursive:true});copyFileSync('scripts/security-check.sh','.git/hooks/pre-commit');chmodSync('.git/hooks/pre-commit','755');console.log('✅ Git hooks installed');}catch(e){console.warn('⚠️  Could not install git hooks:',e.message);}"
